name: Evt Limited
analysis: EVT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$13.0000, stop A$12.0038, target A$15.9887 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
